escalate: When ESC sample delays using the temp always include the 8-digit barcode & the return tracking number in your escalation notes!
templates: We have multiple order delay templates depending on circumstances (delivery from SneakPeak to cx)
We have multiple Sample delay templates depending on circumstance (delivery from cx to SneakPeak)
promo_and_exclusions: Codes are only valid on test kits purchased from SneakPeekTest.com
They're not valid on the lab fee or shipping charges that are associated with the test kit sold in stores (e.g. Walgreens)

conversation.message_text:
SneakPeek: April Flash Sale ending! Last chance to save up to $25 on our test. Order now before it ends tonight.

https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/at-d1zU9Vk_C

SneakPeek: Happy Mother's Day! Until May 15th, discover fetal sex as early as 6 weeks into pregnancy with up to $25 off. 

https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/ajUhlf0j7lPR

SneakPeek: Hey , I'm Sophia your personal shopping assistant. Welcome to our exclusive VIP list!

You can text me anytime for support, recommendations, or anything in between. Is there anything I can assist you with today?

https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/apLM6rKWpg3z .
SneakPeek: Hey, we noticed you checking us out. Have you seen our best-selling >99% accurate Early Gender DNA At-Home test? https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/aFfurZ0-HePt
Can you please tell me the expected arrival date of my order? It's been stuck in the same location for 4-5 days now. Order number 804014

SneakPeek: Sorry to hear that! Our apologies on behalf of our shipping carrier for the unexpected delay. If the tracking shows no movement after another day, please contact our Customer Care team to further assist: https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/sl/Gq4FYUzx/
We are just expecting results this week, and need them by Friday at the latest, and I am concerned with it now being Tuesday. I shipped on Wednesday 5/22 first thing in the morning.
SneakPeek: I'll have my team look into this further for you. Could you please provide your 8-digit test barcode, and your sample's return tracking number?
S0300201 is the test barcode and the tracking is 9401916902668880169111
SneakPeek: Thanks for that information! I'll pass this along to my team and get back to you as soon as possible. Hang tight!
Thank you

SneakPeek: Thanks for your patience! I just heard from the team and we are sorry your sample has not arrived sooner, this appears to have been lost in transit with USPS: https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/sl/BzZtZ0ns

We're happy to help, we'll get you set up with a new kit on us. Could you please provide your order date, order number, and the full name and email address under which your test was purchased?
Oh no 😪 we have a gender reveal planned for Saturday
SneakPeek: I'm sorry for the trouble. It's not the experience we want you to have. If you'd like us to send another kit, do let us know and we'll be happy to assist. Thanks for your patience.
How fast can a new kit arrive?

SneakPeek: Thank you for the question. For domestic orders, you can find detailed shipping info here: https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/sl/m5ZoZt4u/ For Canadian and UK orders, shipping takes 1-2 business days, and for Australia, it takes 1-4 business days. I hope this helps!
Could I pay an upgrade for fast track? We really need our results back by Saturday morning
I ordered on 5/14/24, order number 804014, under Calli Martinez and email callikay97@yahoo.com

If there was a way to upgrade to fast track and have the kit arrive in time for my results to be sent by Saturday June 1st (in the morning) I'd be more than happy to receive a new kit. But I needed results by the 1st.
SneakPeek: I totally understand! I'd like to check this with my team. Please, hang tight!

I have a Walgreens that says they carry the test kit also. If that were an easier way to go about this. I could test tonight and drop off at the post office in the morning, but I would need test activation and shipping label.
SneakPeek: Thanks for letting me know, and I understand. I'm happy to also check that with my team for you, and I'll get back to you as soon as I hear back!
Thank you.
SneakPeek: You're welcome! In the meantime, is there anything that I can assist you with while waiting for an update?
I don't think so, I will just be waiting.
SneakPeek: Thank you. It's a little late so it's likely I won't hear back by today, though rest assured I'll reach out once business hours resume.
Oh, okay
What are business hours?
SneakPeek: Good question! Our normal business hours are Monday through Friday from 9am to 5pm PST. I hope this helps.
Okay
SneakPeek: Thanks for understanding. Is there anything else that I can help with while I wait for a response from the team?
No thank you

Good morning, please let me know as soon as possible if it's possible to do fast track shipping with me purchasing a kit from Walgreens and I can get that done on my lunch break and mail it out today.

SneakPeek: Hello, I have reached out to my team about fast-tracking your order, however I do not have a response yet. I will let you know as soon as I hear back! While I have you here, is there anything else I can help you with?
I just wanted to reach back out during business hours in hopes to hear back faster. Thank you.
SneakPeek: I understand! Rest assured, I will let you know as soon as I get a response from the team. Thank you for your patience.
Thank you
Do you have any updates?

SneakPeek: Thank you for reaching out. I'm really sorry for the delay. It is not the experience that we want to have for our customers. Right now, I still have no response from the team. But rest assured, once I get an update, I will message you immediately. Please hang tight!
You are almost closed for today, I assume you haven't heard anything?
SneakPeek: That's right and I apologize for the long wait. Our team is doing everything to respond to each inquiry in a timely manner. I'll let you know once there's an update.
Okay.
SneakPeek: Thanks for your patience. Is there anything else that I can help with while I wait for a response from the team?

SneakPeek: Hey again! I just heard from the team who let me know that we do offer an upgrade to a FastTrack return for $45. Your retest will come in 1 business day, with a FedEx Overnight return label for the return of your sample, along with expedited lab work and results delivered to you by 8:59pm Pacific Time the same day your sample is delivered.

If you'd like to take advantage of this FastTrack upgrade, let me know by providing your order number tomorrow by 10 AM PST! We'll help set this up and send you a payment link here. We've set up a secure payment link: Click Here to Upgrade Your Test Method: https://sneakpeektest.attn.tv/sl/tcCSA1j3
Reply to this message with the order number of your upgrade once you've been able to submit this, and we'll request your retest is sent expedited tomorrow with our daily shipments.
With this would my results be here by Saturday morning?

SneakPeek: Thank you for this question! Your retest will come in 1 business day, with a FedEx Overnight return label for the return of your sample, along with expedited lab work and results delivered to you by 8:59pm Pacific Time the same day your sample is delivered.
So if I ordered tonight the test could be here tomorrow for me to take and return tomorrow?
SneakPeek: I'm circling back with the team and rest assured that I'll be back as soon as I have the info.
Okay. I just don't want to waste anymore money if my results are unable to be delivered by Friday evening.
I've spent the entire day upset because I'm more than likely having to cancel my weekend and tell my family and friends not to drive out of their way to come to town.

SneakPeek: I'm very sorry for the delay and inconvenience that this transaction may have caused. I've made sure to tag this with priority and I'll let you know immediately once I hear back from the team.
But it is after business hours now tonight so you probably will not hear back. Is that correct?
Template used: "Escalating after business hours - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 17:45:06.600

SneakPeek: I understand that it's late, so it's unlikely that I will hear back from you today. But please rest assured that I'll reach out as soon as business hours resume. Appreciate your patience on this!

conversation.message_text: Bullion Shark: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Bullion Shark: Welcome! Your coupon code is WELCOME5. Shop 2025 Silver Eagles & more: https://bullionshark.attn.tv/aqSH9yqlc6B1 .

Bullion Shark: Sold out at the mint!

2025 Marine Corps Privy American Eagle w/ OGP Box & COA - 250th Anniversary: bullionshark.attn.tv/adzgArhsYN1A

Bullion Shark: Hey there, this is Jordan. Thanks for checking us out! https://bullionshark.attn.tv/aktr4irYT6r5 

Any questions I can answer for you?

Bullion Shark: Hey there, this is Jordan. Thanks for checking us out!bullionshark.attn.tv/ajfqbjsBJ7y2 

Any questions I can answer for you?
Why was I triple billed for my order?

Bullion Shark: I'm so sorry to hear that! Upon checking from my end, I can only see one order placed on December 31, 2025. You may have this coordinated with your bank, or feel free to reach out directly at customerservice@bullionsharks.com, or give us a call at 516-739-5822. Our team is happy to help!
One order but three times I was billed for the one order. Why don't tou assist with contacting customer service?
Bullion Shark: I'm sorry about that! Can you confirm if the other charges are currently pending or posted?
Pending. I will contest all if this isn't corrected ASAP so that there is only a single charge.
​👍​ to “ Pending. I will contest all if this isn't corrected ASAP so that there is only a single charge.  ”

Bullion Shark: Thanks for letting me know. If the charge on your account is still showing as pending, it means the payment hasn't been completed yet. It should either be refunded within 24 - 48 hours or go through successfully. If it's refunded, you can try placing the order again. If it processes, you'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
Also I was supposed to get a 5% discount by adding my info. But on the order page there was never a place to put the discount code. I suppose that should have been a red flag.

Bullion Shark: Thanks for sharing, and I apologize for the inconvenience. Could you please let me know where the discount was from? There's an option to add a coupon when viewing your cart and during checkout. Simply click on "Coupon / gift certificate" so the box to type in the code shows up.

Bullion Shark: Welcome! Your coupon code is WELCOME5. Shop 2025 Silver Eagles & more: https://bullionshark.attn.tv/aqSH9yqlc6B1 .

But there wasn't such an option at the cart check out. I think I should cancel this order.  Can you assist in canceling?

Bullion Shark: I completely understand your concern, and I'm really sorry for the trouble. I can check if that's possible. Can I please have the order number and your email address? Please let me know, I'm here to assist you.

Order # 101857. Email kbr1@cox.net
I can block text and email if this is used for further advertising. I should have checked better business reviews for bullion shark. I will file bbb report if this is not corrected.
